name: e2a
description: Authenticated email gateway for AI agents — per-agent inboxes, HITL approval, SPF/DKIM verification, and a queryable, replayable event log. 37 MCP tools over hosted streamable HTTP with OAuth.

interface.longDescription: Bundles the hosted e2a MCP server and an operate-well skill so an agent can send and receive real email from per-agent inboxes — with SPF/DKIM verification, human-in-the-loop review holds, custom domains, attachments, and a replayable event log.
